name: Pumpkin Pie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the margarine and sugar together until creamy.
2. Stir in the flour and walnuts until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Reserve about a third of the mixture for the topping.
4. Press the remaining crumb mixture onto the bottom of a 15 x 10 x 1 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 18 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Meanwhile, blend the pumpkin, condensed milk, molasses, eggs, pumpkin pie spice, and vanilla extract.
7. Pour the mixture over the crumb crust.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining crumb mixture.
9. Bake for an additional 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
10. Cool on a wire rack and drizzle with powdered sugar if desired.
11. Cut into 1 x 2 inch bars.
